title: OpenAI updating ChatGPT desktop app with GPT Voice for talking through work
excerpt: OpenAI is releasing a big update to the ChatGPT desktop app today that introduces GPT Voice mode for talking through...
content_html:
OpenAI is releasing a big update to the ChatGPT desktop app today that introduces GPT Voice mode for talking through work to complete tasks. The new feature is powered by GPT-Live, OpenAI’s upgraded voice mode that arrived on mobile this month.

You can now talk to complete work with ChatGPT on Mac

More details from the app update’s release notes today:

Powered by GPT-Live, ChatGPT Voice lets you talk through work and coordinate tasks in Chat, Work, and Codex in the ChatGPT desktop app.

Start a new chat or task in voice mode, then ask ChatGPT to start, check, or steer work in other threads.

While ChatGPT Voice is available on both macOS and Windows, Mac users can enjoy one more capability with Appshots. When used with ChatGPT Voice, Appshots lets ChatGPT reference the active window in focus for better context.

ChatGPT Voice also works with OpenAI’s highly capable Computer Use feature, local files, and ChatGPT plugins.

The release notes clarify that voice is supported on OpenAI plans including Plus, Pro, Business, Edu, and Enterprise on desktop. The new voice mode also works with ChatGPT’s Remote feature on iOS.

Additionally, this week’s ChatGPT desktop app update improves how project folders work.

Local projects in the ChatGPT desktop app can now include multiple related folders. From a project’s menu, select Edit project to add folders and choose the primary folder. New chats, Git operations, and automatic discovery of AGENTS.md, skills, and config.toml use the primary folder. Secondary folders remain available for file search, reading, and editing.

You can learn more about ChatGPT Voice here, and find out more about multi-folder local projects here.

9to5Mac’s Take

People still have strong feelings about the Codex app essentially becoming the new ChatGPT desktop app and adding ChatGPT Work. While the recent app updates don’t really help with the native Mac app feel (and size), it’s good to see OpenAI add modern features to the new Mac app.

Voice mode was removed from the old Mac app a while ago, and it never gained the new GPT-Live version that ChatGPT for iPhone and iPad offers. As of today, the Mac now has a first-class voice mode again, and it’s more capable than before.

Related ChatGPT stories:

  • OpenAI unveils ChatGPT Work agent, GPT-5.6 models now available
  • OpenAI just upgraded ChatGPT voice mode in a major way, including CarPlay
  • OpenAI tweaks chat access in the ChatGPT app for Mac

The new feature is powered by GPT-Live, OpenAI’s upgraded voice mode that arrived on mobile this month. You can now talk to complete work with ChatGPT on Mac More details from the app update’s release notes today: Powered by GPT-Live, ChatGPT Voice lets you talk through work and coordinate tasks in Chat, Work, and Codex in the ChatGPT desktop app. Start a new chat or task in voice mode, then ask ChatGPT to start, check, or steer work in other threads. content_html_zh:
OpenAI 今天发布了 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序的重大更新，引入了 GPT 语音模式，用于通过工作对话来完成任务。 这项新功能由 OpenAI 的升级版语音模式 GPT-Live 提供支持，该模式已于本月登陆移动设备。

您现在可以在 Mac 上使用 ChatGPT 来完成工作

今天应用程序更新的发行说明中提供了更多详细信息：

ChatGPT Voice 由 GPT-Live 提供支持，可让您在 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序的 Chat、Work 和 Codex 中讨论工作并协调任务。 以语音模式启动新的聊天或任务，然后要求 ChatGPT 启动、检查或引导其他线程中的工作。

虽然 ChatGPT Voice 在 macOS 和 Windows 上均可用，但 Mac 用户还可以通过 Appshots 享受另一项功能。 与 ChatGPT Voice 一起使用时，Appshots 可让 ChatGPT 引用焦点中的活动窗口以获得更好的上下文。

ChatGPT Voice 还可以与 OpenAI 的高性能计算机使用功能、本地文件和 ChatGPT 插件配合使用。

发行说明澄清了 OpenAI 计划支持语音，包括桌面上的 Plus、Pro、Business、Edu 和 Enterprise。 新的语音模式还可以与 iOS 上的 ChatGPT 远程功能配合使用。

此外，本周的 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序更新改进了项目文件夹的工作方式。

ChatGPT 桌面应用程序中的本地项目现在可以包含多个相关文件夹。 从项目的菜单中，选择编辑项目以添加文件夹并选择主文件夹。 新的聊天、Git 操作以及 AGENTS.md、技能和 config.toml 的自动发现使用主文件夹。 辅助文件夹仍然可用于文件搜索、阅读和编辑。

您可以在此处了解有关 ChatGPT Voice 的更多信息，并在此处了解有关多文件夹本地项目的更多信息。

9to5Mac 的观点

人们仍然对 Codex 应用程序本质上成为新的 ChatGPT 桌面应用程序并添加 ChatGPT Work 抱有强烈的感情。 虽然最近的应用程序更新并不能真正改善原生 Mac 应用程序的感觉（和大小），但很高兴看到 OpenAI 为新的 Mac 应用程序添加了现代功能。

语音模式不久前已从旧的 Mac 应用程序中删除，并且从未获得 ChatGPT for iPhone 和 iPad 提供的新 GPT-Live 版本。 截至今天，Mac 再次拥有一流的语音模式，而且比以前更强大。

相关 ChatGPT 故事：

  • OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Work 代理，GPT-5.6 模型现已上市
  • OpenAI刚刚对ChatGPT语音模式进行了重大升级，包括CarPlay
  • OpenAI 调整 Mac 版 ChatGPT 应用程序中的聊天访问

FTC：我们使用赚取收入的汽车联盟链接。 更多的。
